title: Prominence's Custom Lootr Chests
description: Makes Lootr chests have Prominence's art style.
body:
Prominence's Custom Lootr Chests

Makes all Lootr chests, shulkers, barrels, etc. have a Prominence artstyle, turning them into rocky chests that have lava details when they're not opened.

![Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177d113b6b7e1a5b1cf77f9d462b01268cbc3c51_0.webp)
